title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Lakeland Industries, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Lakeland Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAKE) and certain officers, alleging federal securities law violations. The lawsuit targets materially false and misleading statements made by the company regarding its business, operations, and prospects between December 1, 2023, and December 9, 2025. Investors who purchased Lakeland securities during this period are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 24, 2026.

title: Adeia and UMC deepen 3D chiplet bonding pact for next-gen devices
summary: Adeia and United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) have expanded and renewed their IP licensing relationship. This agreement grants UMC continued access to Adeia's semiconductor portfolio, including hybrid bonding technologies, and extends their collaboration into future generations of 3D integration and advanced packaging, particularly for chiplet architectures and AI-driven applications. The collaboration focuses on enhancing semiconductor manufacturing capabilities with advanced technologies for improved power efficiency, bandwidth, and reliability for next-gen devices.

title: Blackstone taps specialist for cooling next-gen data centers and chips
summary: Blackstone Energy Transition Partners has announced an agreement to acquire a majority stake in Advanced Cooling Technologies (ACT), a leader in thermal management solutions. This acquisition aims to support ACT's growth in providing advanced cooling for data centers and high-performance chips, an area experiencing rising demand due to increased power intensity and AI innovation. ACT's management will remain in place and continue as significant shareholders.

title: Cancer trial logs 100% responses as Tempest readies next TPST-2003 study
summary: Tempest Therapeutics announced a partnership with Cincinnati Children’s AGCTC to advance its dual-targeting CAR-T therapy, TPST-2003, for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma. The collaboration will focus on technology transfer and IND-enabling manufacturing, aiming for an IND filing in Q4 2026. Interim data from the REDEEM-1 trial showed a 100% overall response rate among evaluable patients and 100% complete response in six efficacy-evaluable patients, positioning TPST-2003 as a potential class-leading therapy.

title: Inside the $454.9M cloud revamp speeding U.S. Air Force missions worldwide
summary: Leidos has secured a $454.9 million contract to modernize the U.S. Air Force's Cloud One platform, partnering with major cloud providers like AWS, Azure, GCP, and Oracle. This initiative aims to enhance security, automation, and operational efficiency, thereby accelerating cloud adoption across Air Force units. The program aligns with Leidos' NorthStar 2030 strategy, focusing on federal technology and cybersecurity innovation.

title: Leidos to modernize and secure U.S. Air Force cloud operations for faster, safer mission readiness
summary: Leidos has secured a $454.9 million contract to modernize and secure the U.S. Air Force's Cloud One platform. This initiative aims to accelerate the secure deployment of cloud capabilities, enhance security, increase automation, and simplify operations across the Air Force's multi-cloud environment. The program is also designed to provide a repeatable, secure cloud foundation that other Department of War organizations can adopt, fostering faster and more secure mission readiness.

title: Emboline, Inc. Secures $20 Million in Growth Capital from Trinity Capital Inc. to Support Commercialization of the Emboliner® Embolic Protection System to Minimize Stroke Risk From TAVR
summary: Emboline, Inc., a medical technology company, has secured $20 million in growth capital from Trinity Capital Inc. to support the commercialization of its Emboliner® Embolic Protection System. This system aims to reduce stroke risk during transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) procedures by capturing embolic debris. The funding will facilitate the upcoming commercial launch in the United States and Europe and further development of its technology platform, following the completion of an IDE clinical trial whose results will be presented on March 29, 2026.

title: $20M backs device to reduce stroke risk in heart valve procedures
summary: Emboline, Inc. secured $20 million in growth capital from Trinity Capital (Nasdaq: TRIN) to commercialize its Emboliner® Embolic Protection System, designed to minimize stroke risk during transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) procedures. The funding will support U.S. and European commercial launch preparations, with results from its PROTECT H2H IDE clinical trial to be presented on March 29, 2026. The Emboliner device is currently investigational and not yet commercially available.

title: How does a global payroll transformation affect workers?
summary: Toni Hoffmann, director of financial people management at SIXT, explains how unifying global payroll systems improves transparency and strategic planning. A unified system offers employees easier access to their payroll data, eliminating the need to navigate multiple platforms. Hoffmann highlights three key lessons for a successful transformation: engaging employees, ensuring a stable data foundation, and fostering transparency with partners like ADP.

title: Trinity Capital Inc. Provides $20 Million in Growth Capital to Emboline, Inc. to Advance Interventional Heart Procedure Technology
summary: Trinity Capital Inc. has committed $20 million in growth capital to Emboline, Inc., a MedTech company. This financing will support Emboline's efforts to advance its Emboliner® Embolic Protection Catheter, designed to reduce strokes and complications during interventional heart procedures. The capital will help scale manufacturing, expand the team, and bring the Emboliner system to commercial launch after completing clinical trials.

title: Union Pacific CEO and CFO to address J.P. Morgan's 2026 Industrials Conference
summary: Union Pacific's CEO, Jim Vena, and CFO, Jennifer Hamann, are scheduled to address the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 8:45 a.m. ET. A live webcast of their presentation will be available on Union Pacific's investor relations website, with an audio replay accessible shortly after. The company, operating in 23 western states, emphasizes its role in connecting communities and its commitment to environmentally responsible freight transportation.

title: Supermicro backs BlockchAIn push to build AI data centers faster, cheaper
summary: BlockchAIn LLC, operating under Signing Day Sports (NYSE American: AIB), has partnered with Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI) to integrate high-density AI compute hardware into its U.S. data center development pipeline. This collaboration aims to deliver end-to-end AI infrastructure faster and more affordably by standardizing hardware and leveraging BlockchAIn's "power-first" strategy, which converts scarce electricity into predictable AI compute capacity. BlockchAIn reported 2024 operating revenue of $22.9 million and net income of $5.7 million.

title: US Sen. Jon Husted set to testify remotely in ex-FirstEnergy executives' corruption trial
summary: U.S. Sen. Jon Husted is scheduled to testify remotely as a defense witness in the corruption trial of former FirstEnergy Corp. executives Chuck Jones and Michael Dowling. Husted, who is facing a retention bid for his Senate seat, will likely corroborate details from meetings and correspondences related to the $60 million bribery scandal involving a $1 billion bailout for FirstEnergy-associated nuclear plants. The trial implicates figures like late utility regulator Sam Randazzo and former Ohio House Speaker Larry Householder.

title: ON Semiconductor (ON) Announces Leadership Transition in Power Solutions Group
summary: ON Semiconductor (ON) has announced that Simon Keeton, Group President of the Power Solutions Group, will resign on June 30, 2026. Keeton, who has been with the company since 2007 and in his current role since February 2024, will remain until then to ensure a smooth transition. This leadership change is a significant development for the company as it seeks to appoint a successor and continue its strategic initiatives in the semiconductor industry.

title: Is Gartner Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Gartner (IT) stock has significantly underperformed the S&P 500 and a peer over the past year, dropping 66.3% from its 52-week high. This decline followed a revenue miss and an investigation into potential federal securities law violations after its Q4 2025 earnings release. Wall Street analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold," anticipating a modest rebound potential.

title: CEO Andrew Sullivan named as Prudential's new chairman
summary: Andrew Sullivan, the CEO of Prudential Financial, has also been appointed chairman of the board, consolidating his leadership at one of America's largest insurers. This move follows the resignation of Charles Lowrey and comes as Sullivan implements a significant strategic overhaul, focusing on profitable growth opportunities, improved execution, and a high-performance culture. The company has also reported increased net income for 2025 and is reshaping its portfolio by divesting certain operations.

title: Vision Marine Technologies Positions for Scalable Electric Adoption Through Dominant Pontoon Segment; Introduces SPECTR 26 Flagship Platform
summary: Vision Marine Technologies is strategically focusing on the North American pontoon segment for scalable electric adoption, a dominant category in recreational boating. The company introduced its flagship electric tritoon, SPECTR 26, powered by its high-performance 180HP electric 180E outboard, designed for stability, efficiency, and ease of use. This move targets a high-volume market with established consumer demand to accelerate the adoption of electric marine propulsion systems.

title: Franklin Resources Inc. Increases Citigroup Stake
summary: Franklin Resources Inc. has increased its stake in Citigroup Inc. by 1.8% in the third quarter of 2025, now owning 32,870,559 shares valued at $3.34 billion, representing 1.84% of Citigroup's shares outstanding. This move by one of the world's largest asset managers signals confidence in Citigroup's long-term growth potential and positions it as the 17th largest holding in Franklin Resources' equity portfolio. The increased stake suggests Franklin Resources sees further upside potential in the banking giant's stock.

title: Southern Copper Corporation $SCCO Shares Acquired by Schroder Investment Management Group
summary: Schroder Investment Management Group significantly increased its stake in Southern Copper Corporation ($SCCO) by 54.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 178,350 shares. This move brings their total holdings to 505,284 shares, valued at approximately $61.32 million. Despite this institutional buying, analyst sentiment remains largely negative, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average price target of $139.99 for SCCO.

title: Stardust Power Announces Year End 2025 Earnings Release Date, Conference Call
summary: Stardust Power Inc. announced it will release its year-end 2025 financial results after market close on Tuesday, March 17, 2026. A conference call will be hosted by CEO Roshan Pujari and CFO Uday Devasper at 5:30 PM ET on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, to discuss these results. Stardust Power is an American developer of battery-grade lithium carbonate, currently building a refinery in Muskogee, Oklahoma.

title: Stardust Power to detail 2025 results in March 25 investor call
summary: Stardust Power (NASDAQ: SDST) announced that it will release its year-end 2025 financial results after market close on Tuesday, March 17, 2026. Founder & CEO Roshan Pujari and CFO Uday Devasper will host a conference call on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, at 5:30 PM ET to discuss the results. Participants can register to receive dial-in details or access a live audio webcast of the call.

title: Silvercorp Metals Inc (NYSEARCA:SVM) Passes Key Quality Investing Screens
summary: Silvercorp Metals Inc (NYSEARCA:SVM) has successfully passed several key quality investing screens, indicating strong financial health and profitability. The company demonstrates a high Return on Invested Capital, low debt-to-free cash flow, and robust historical growth in sales and EBIT. While its fundamental report notes average financial health, it is considered low-priced and growing strongly, making it a compelling prospect for quality-oriented investors, though further analysis of commodity cycles and political risks is recommended.

title: Protara Therapeutics (NASDAQ:TARA) Releases Earnings Results, Misses Expectations By $0.03 EPS
summary: Protara Therapeutics (NASDAQ:TARA) reported quarterly earnings of ($0.37) per share, missing the consensus estimate of ($0.34) by $0.03. The stock is currently trading around $5.75, with analysts having an average price target of $21.50 and a "Moderate Buy" rating. Institutional investors collectively own about 38.13% of the shares, showing recent increases in holdings from several firms.

title: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. Decreases Position in New Gold Inc. $NGD
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. reduced its holdings in New Gold Inc. (NYSE:NGD) by 29.7% in Q3 2025, selling 248,000 shares but still retaining 585,660 shares valued at approximately $4.20 million. Despite this decrease, institutional ownership of New Gold stands at 42.82%, with several other funds, including Millennium Management and Goldman Sachs, significantly increasing their stakes. Analysts have a consensus "Buy" rating for New Gold, with recent upgrades and an average price target of $8.18, while the stock recently traded at $11.52.

title: Preformed Line Products (NASDAQ:PLPC) Upgraded to Strong-Buy at Freedom Capital
summary: Freedom Capital upgraded Preformed Line Products (NASDAQ:PLPC) to a "Strong-Buy" rating, setting a target price of $275.00. This upgrade follows PLPC beating EPS estimates in its latest earnings report, despite slightly missing revenue forecasts. The company's financials include a market capitalization of $1.30 billion, a P/E of 37.13, and institutional ownership of 41.19%.

title: Schroder Investment Management Group Boosts Holdings in Semtech Corporation $SMTC
summary: Schroder Investment Management Group significantly increased its stake in Semtech Corporation by 199.3% in Q3, now owning 879,880 shares valued at approximately $62.9 million. Other major institutions like Ameriprise, State Street, Westfield, and Alliancebernstein also increased their holdings. Despite positive news such as product wins, AI partnerships, and analyst price target upgrades, significant insider selling and a high P/E ratio of around 282-283 for Semtech present potential risks.

title: Barclays Bank PLC - Pricing of accelerated placing in Harbour Energy
summary: Potomac View Investments, L.P., an entity managed by EIG Management Company, LLC, has completed a secondary placing of 60,000,000 ordinary shares in Harbour Energy PLC at 255 pence per share, raising approximately £153 million. These shares represent about 3.8% of Harbour Energy's issued capital, and following the placing, the Seller's stake will be approximately 3.5%. Barclays Bank PLC acted as the Sole Global Co-ordinator and Sole Bookrunner for the Placing.

title: Minerva Neurosciences Q4 & 2025 Financials: Annual Loss of $293.4M - News and Statistics
summary: Minerva Neurosciences reported a significant financial loss for both the fourth quarter and the full year of 2025. The company recorded a quarterly loss of $283.7 million, or $25.51 per share, with an adjusted per-share loss of 64 cents. For the entire year, Minerva Neurosciences experienced a total loss of $293.4 million, translating to $34.67 per share.

title: Minerva Neurosciences 10-K: Revenue $0, EPS (34.67) on large net loss
summary: Minerva Neurosciences reported zero revenue for the year, ending with a net loss of $293.42 million due to significant non-cash financing-related items. The company is progressing a Phase 3 program for roluperidone, with a planned trial initiation in Q2 2026 and topline results expected in 2027, and has secured $200 million in funding to support these activities. Additionally, they sold future royalty rights for seltorexant to Royalty Pharma for $60 million.

title: Geneva Capital Management LLC Sells 139,044 Shares of SPS Commerce, Inc. $SPSC
summary: Geneva Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in SPS Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ:SPSC) by selling 139,044 shares, now holding approximately 1.27% of the company valued at $49.99 million. This move is part of broader insider selling activity, with CEO Chadwick Collins and Director Marty M. Reaume also selling shares in recent months. Despite mixed analyst ratings, SPS Commerce reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance.

title: Citi Trends, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High at $49.83, Up 118%
summary: Citi Trends, Inc. has reached a new 52-week high of $49.83, marking a 118.05% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the S&P 500. Despite this strong stock performance and a market capitalization of $714 million, the company faces financial challenges, including a negative return on equity and a high price-to-book ratio. Citi Trends, a microcap player in the footwear industry, does not currently offer a dividend.

title: Spine surgery wounds: CellerateRX study finds $3,852 saved per patient
summary: Sanara MedTech (Nasdaq: SMTI) announced the publication of a peer-reviewed study in the Journal of Medical Economics evaluating its CellerateRX Surgical Powder for high-risk spine surgery wounds. The study found that CellerateRX demonstrated a dominant cost-effectiveness profile, generating $3,852 in cost savings and a 0.007 QALY gain per patient, resulting in a net monetary benefit of $4,542, primarily due to avoided hospital readmissions and surgical revisions. This evidence supports CellerateRX's value in improving health outcomes and reducing healthcare expenditures for high-risk spine surgery patients.

title: Sonida Senior Living: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
summary: Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (SNDA) reported a fourth-quarter loss of $29.8 million, or $1.72 per share. Adjusted for asset impairment costs, losses were $1.29 per share. The company posted revenue of $97.7 million, with adjusted revenue at $87.4 million, and a full-year loss of $70.8 million on revenue of $336.4 million.

title: Invitation Homes stock hits 52-week low at $25.20
summary: Invitation Homes (INVH) stock recently dropped to a new 52-week low of $25.20, marking a 23.75% decline over the past year. Despite beating Q4 2025 earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.24, the stock still fell, leading KeyBanc and Citizens to lower their price targets due to market pressures and a decline in new lease rate growth. The REIT, with a $15.5 billion market cap and a P/E of 26.37, faces ongoing industry challenges.

title: NASA Awards Redwire $4 Million In Additional Funding to Support Trailblazing Drug Development in Microgravity
summary: NASA has awarded Redwire Corporation an additional $4 million to advance new drug development investigations on the International Space Station (ISS) using Redwire's Pharmaceutical In-space Laboratory (PIL-BOX) technology. This funding expands an existing contract under NASA's In Space Production Applications (InSPA) program, aiming to revolutionize both the space and pharmaceutical industries. Redwire's PIL-BOX technology has already contributed to growing high-quality crystals for medicines and is currently supporting cancer therapy investigations, with the goal of improving treatments for various diseases by leveraging microgravity.

title: Sonida Senior Living (NYSE: SNDA) scales with $1.8B CHP deal and higher 2025 loss
summary: Sonida Senior Living reported strong revenue growth in 2025, with resident revenue up 24% to $332 million and Adjusted EBITDA increasing to $53.8 million. Despite this, the company experienced a widening net loss to $76.4 million due to higher operating costs, transaction charges related to its transformative $1.8 billion acquisition of CNL Healthcare Properties (CHP), and impairments. The CHP merger significantly scales Sonida's portfolio to 153 owned properties and involved a major refinancing effort, with management expecting it to be accretive to normalized FFO per share and materially impact 2026 financial results.

title: Universal Health Services to acquire Talkspace in $835 million deal
summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) has agreed to acquire virtual behavioral health provider Talkspace for approximately $835 million, at $5.25 per share. This acquisition aims to expand UHS's outpatient and telehealth mental health services, leveraging Talkspace's digital platform that connects patients with licensed clinicians. The deal, expected to close in Q3 2026, is anticipated to be slightly accretive to UHS's adjusted earnings per share within the first year.

title: Clarksons expands shipping stock coverage as Omar Nokta rejoins bank
summary: Clarksons Securities is expanding its shipping stock coverage with Omar Nokta rejoining the bank. The bank has initiated equity research on Danaos, Dorian LPG, Flex LNG, and Navios, reinforcing its presence in the shipping finance sector.

title: Top Companies in the Flexible Electronics Market - LG Display
summary: The Flexible Electronics Market is a rapidly growing sector, driven by innovations in bendable, lightweight components for various industries. Key players like Samsung Electronics, LG Display, BOE Technology Group, and Royole Corporation are leading advancements in flexible display technology, while companies such as E Ink Holdings and Panasonic Holdings focus on e-paper and printed electronics. The market offers significant investment opportunities, especially in wearable technology and printed electronics startups, despite challenges in manufacturing complexity and durability.

title: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. Cuts Holdings in RB Global, Inc. $RBA
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. significantly reduced its stake in RB Global (NYSE:RBA) by 27.2% in the third quarter, now holding 80,160 shares valued at $8.684 million. Despite this, RB Global reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has received multiple "Buy" ratings from analysts with an average price target of $129.29. Insider selling by CEO James Francis Kessler was also noted, reducing his position by over 16%.

title: Regal Rexnord Corporation $RRX Stock Position Raised by Schroder Investment Management Group
summary: Schroder Investment Management Group has significantly increased its stake in Regal Rexnord Corporation (NYSE:RRX) by 27.9%, now owning 384,560 shares worth over $55 million. This coincides with several Wall Street analysts raising their price targets for RRX, contributing to an average "Moderate Buy" rating. The company recently reported slightly better-than-expected EPS and a 4.3% year-over-year revenue increase.

title: 41,500 Shares in CareTrust REIT, Inc. $CTRE Acquired by WINTON GROUP Ltd
summary: WINTON GROUP Ltd has acquired 41,500 shares of CareTrust REIT (NASDAQ:CTRE) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $1.44 million. This acquisition is part of a broader trend of institutional investors increasing their stakes in CTRE, with major additions from Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, Geode Capital Management LLC, Invesco Ltd., and Dimensional Fund Advisors LP. Analysts currently rate CareTrust REIT as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $40.18, with several firms raising their targets to between $40-$43.

title: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. Purchases New Position in Americas Gold and Silver Corporation $USAS
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. has acquired a new position of 425,000 shares, valued at $1,585,000, in Americas Gold and Silver Corporation (NYSEAMERICAN:USAS) during the third quarter. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the company. Americas Gold and Silver stock was up 5.3% at $8.60, with a consensus "Buy" rating and a target price of $9.75 from Wall Street analysts.

title: Allied Gold (NYSE:AAUC) Cut to Hold at Zacks Research
summary: Zacks Research downgraded Allied Gold (NYSE:AAUC) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating, following similar downgrades from Canaccord Genuity Group and Stifel Nicolaus. The company now has an average rating of "Reduce" from investment analysts. Allied Gold's stock performance shows a 50-day moving average price of $29.63 and a 200-day moving average price of $22.18, with a market cap of $3.96 billion.

title: Custom Truck One Source, Inc. (NYSE:CTOS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Custom Truck One Source, Inc. (NYSE: CTOS) reported a strong finish to 2025 with record quarterly and full-year revenues and adjusted EBITDA, exceeding expectations. The company saw significant growth in its rental business, driven by strong demand in transmission and distribution markets, and provided an optimistic outlook for 2026 with projected revenue and adjusted EBITDA increases. Custom Truck One Source also announced a strategic shift to a two-segment reporting structure (Specialty Equipment Rentals and Specialty Truck Equipment and Manufacturing) and detailed plans for continued investment in TES and fleet management for increased free cash flow and deleveraging.

title: WisdomTree and Halo Investing Collaborate to Launch First-of-its-Kind Defined Outcome SMA Strategy, Expanding Access to Innovative Advisor Solutions
summary: WisdomTree and Halo Investing have partnered to launch the Halo-WisdomTree Structured Income Strategy, a defined outcome separately managed account (SMA) designed to provide income, enhance risk-adjusted returns, and offer buffered downside protection. This collaboration expands WisdomTree’s solutions platform beyond traditional ETFs, aiming to provide financial advisors with scalable tools for portfolio construction. The strategy leverages WisdomTree’s asset allocation expertise and Halo’s structured note capabilities to create an outcome-oriented solution with built-in yield enhancement and principal protection.

title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Decreases Holdings in WisdomTree, Inc. $WT
summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in WisdomTree, Inc. by 53.1% in the third quarter, now owning 0.74% of the company's stock. Despite this, other hedge funds adjusted their positions, with some increasing and others decreasing their holdings. WisdomTree recently reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

title: TD Bank Group Management Proxy Circular Now Available
summary: TD Bank Group (TD) announced the filing of its notice of annual meeting and management proxy circular. This document provides shareholders with essential information regarding the upcoming annual meeting on April 16, 2026, including details on voting, director elections, auditor appointments, stock incentive plan amendments, and executive compensation. Shareholders are encouraged to review the circular online and vote their shares in advance.

title: Tenax Therapeutics Inc (TENX) Q4 Loss Widens, But Beats Estimates
summary: Tenax Therapeutics Inc (TENX) reported a Q4 2025 GAAP loss of $0.38 per share, which was wider than the previous year but still managed to beat analyst estimates. The company, focused on cardiopulmonary therapies, is advancing its levosimendan formulations through Phase II clinical trials and also developing TNX-201 for chronic myeloid leukemia.

title: Kelcy Warren's energy giant donates to $5 billion pediatric hospital campus
summary: Energy Transfer has donated $15 million to the new $5 billion pediatric hospital campus being built in the Southwestern Medical District, a project by UT Southwestern and Children's Health. This gift will fund a new family lounge within the development. The campus is expected to open in 2031.

title: NCS Multistage (NASDAQ:NCSM) Raised to "Strong-Buy" at Zacks Research
summary: Zacks Research has upgraded NCS Multistage (NASDAQ:NCSM) to a "Strong-Buy" rating. This upgrade follows strong quarterly results where the company significantly beat EPS and revenue estimates, causing its stock to jump by approximately 13%. NCS Multistage now holds an average "Buy" rating from analysts, with a low P/E ratio and substantial institutional ownership.

title: National Fuel Gas (NYSE:NFG) Raised to Hold at Zacks Research
summary: Zacks Research upgraded National Fuel Gas (NYSE:NFG) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. Shares are trading near their 52-week high, with other analysts maintaining a "Hold" consensus rating and an average price target of $96.33.

title: $1.14M luxury homes on show as Toll Brothers debuts Vista Oaks
summary: Toll Brothers announced the grand opening of its new model home at Vista Oaks in Rocklin, California, a community of 46 luxury single-family homes. The homes range from 2,584 to 4,375 sq ft with prices starting at $1.14 million. The public is invited to tour the Cloverwood Coastal Contemporary model home on March 14, 2026, from 11:00 a.m. to 2 p.m.

title: Kohl’s Corporation (NYSE:KSS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Kohl's Corporation reported its Q4 2025 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $1.07. Despite a 2.8% comparable sales decline, the company emphasized strong inventory discipline and expense management, and outlined strategic initiatives for 2026 to focus on curated assortments, value proposition, and omnichannel experience to drive future growth. Executives acknowledged challenges like macroeconomic pressures on low-to-middle-income customers and past inventory missteps, while expressing optimism for progressive improvements.

title: Schroder Investment Management Group Decreases Position in Cavco Industries, Inc. $CVCO
summary: Schroder Investment Management Group reduced its stake in Cavco Industries by 14.2% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 18,478 shares but still holding 111,628 shares valued at approximately $65.37 million. This comes as Cavco missed its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Despite mixed analyst ratings and a market cap of $4.05 billion, company insiders have shown confidence by purchasing shares.

title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Buys 31,981 Shares of Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. $NBIX
summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in Neurocrine Biosciences (NASDAQ:NBIX) by 34.4% in the third quarter, now owning 124,845 shares valued at $17.53 million. Despite missing EPS estimates, the company's revenue beat projections, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $175.05. Insider sales, including CEO Kyle Gano's transaction, were noted during the recent quarter.

title: Clean Energy grows RNG portfolio across the U.S.
summary: Clean Energy Fuels has expanded its renewable natural gas (RNG) supply and fueling infrastructure across the U.S. through new agreements with major trucking, waste, and transit fleets. This includes extending partnerships with Ecology Transportation Services and Recology, maintaining WM's RNG stations, and renewing service agreements with WMATA and other municipal transit services. The company emphasizes RNG's value as a low-carbon alternative.

title: MFN Partners Management LP Sells 8,657,851 Shares of QXO, Inc. $QXO
summary: MFN Partners Management LP reduced its stake in QXO, Inc. (NYSE:QXO) by 18.5% in the third quarter, selling over 8.6 million shares but still retaining QXO as its third-largest holding. Despite this sale, other major institutional investors, including Vanguard, Alpha Wave Global LP, and Affinity Partners GP LP, significantly increased or initiated positions in QXO, bringing overall institutional ownership to 58.68%. QXO is currently trading around $21.57 with a market cap of $15.28 billion and holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with an average price target of $32.43.

title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against CTO Realty Growth, Inc. (CTO) and Encourages Stockholders to Learn More About the Investigation
summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into potential corporate wrongdoing by CTO Realty Growth, Inc. (CTO) and its officers/directors. The firm encourages CTO stockholders who purchased securities prior to February 18, 2021, and still hold them, to contact them to assist in the investigation. The firm operates on a contingency fee basis and aims to restore investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

title: Option Care Health, Inc. $OPCH Shares Acquired by Geneva Capital Management LLC
summary: Geneva Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Option Care Health ($OPCH) by 27.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 296,216 shares. Major institutional investors and hedge funds now own 98.05% of the company's stock. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $37.27 for OPCH.

title: Agora (NASDAQ:API) Downgraded to "Hold" Rating by Zacks Research
summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Agora (NASDAQ:API) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating. Other analysts have also issued "sell" or "hold" ratings, leading to an average "Reduce" rating for the stock. Agora's shares opened at $4.18, with a market capitalization of $390.12 million, and the company recently reported $0.05 EPS for the last quarter.

title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Buys New Holdings in Helios Technologies, Inc. $HLIO
summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. has acquired a new position in Helios Technologies, purchasing 280,040 shares valued at approximately $14.6 million. This move is part of a broader trend of increased institutional investment in Helios Technologies, with other major funds like Thrivent Financial and Bank of America also boosting their stakes. The company recently surpassed EPS expectations and saw a 17.4% revenue increase, holding a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $71.75.

title: Magnetar Financial Increases Stake in ProAssurance
summary: Magnetar Financial LLC has increased its stake in ProAssurance Corporation (NYSE:PRA) by 2.3% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 69,365 shares. This expands their total holdings to 3,026,173 shares, valued at $72.6 million, representing approximately 5.89% of the insurance provider's stock. The move highlights continued institutional confidence in ProAssurance's long-term prospects.

title: Safehold price target raised to $16 from $15 at Mizuho
summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Safehold (SAFE) shares to $16 from $15, while maintaining a Neutral rating. This marks another significant government and military win for GTC, reinforcing NextPlat's multi-segment strategy and its role as a provider of advanced satellite connectivity and IoT solutions.

title: NeuroThera Labs Announces Publication of International Patent in Collaboration with Clearmind Medicine for Novel Therapy Targeting Weight Loss and Fatty Liver Disease
summary: NeuroThera Labs and Clearmind Medicine have announced the publication of an international patent for a novel combination therapy targeting weight loss and metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD). The therapy combines MEAI and PEA, aiming to provide a safe, non-hallucinogenic neuroplastogen treatment, potentially offering a more cost-effective alternative to GLP-1 agonists. This collaboration seeks to address the growing global health challenges of obesity and MASLD, tapping into the rapidly expanding weight loss drugs market.

Agenus aims to be at the forefront of immunotherapy applications in cancer care, emphasizing innovation to overcome existing resistance.

This strategic move aims to preserve capital for key clinical milestones in its central nervous system therapeutics development.

This new offering provides comprehensive, modular coverage starting at CNY 395 (USD 57) per year, with instant digital purchasing and a four-step online claims process. The initiative targets China's rapidly growing low-altitude economy, which is projected to reach CNY 3.5 trillion by 2035 and already has over 2 million registered drones, aiming to convert F+More's business-to-business expertise into a scalable business-to-consumer model.

title: Sociedad Quimica y Minera de Chile (SQM) PT Raised to $100 at Scotiabank as Top 2026 Pick

title: Verrica Pharmaceuticals Q4 revenue jumps on stronger YCANTH demand
summary: Verrica Pharmaceuticals (VRCA) announced a significant increase in its Q4 revenue, attributed to strong demand for its product, YCANTH. This financial improvement highlights a positive performance for the pharmaceutical company by the end of the year.

title: Verrica Pharmaceuticals 2025 10-K: $35.6M Revenue, $(1.68) EPS
summary: Verrica Pharmaceuticals reported its 2025 financial results, with total revenue of $35.6 million and a net loss of $(1.68) per share, an improvement from the prior year. The company saw revenue growth driven by increased YCANTH deliveries and milestone payments, alongside reduced operating expenses. Key business highlights include an expanded commercial strategy, positive regulatory feedback for EU submission, and advancement in its clinical pipeline for common warts and basal cell carcinoma.

title: Verrica Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRCA) Downgraded by Zacks Research to Hold
summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Verrica Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRCA) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating. title: Clinton Township’s Coherent to join S&P 500

This inclusion follows a recent $2 billion investment from Nvidia for research and development, capacity expansion, and a multibillion-dollar purchasing agreement focused on artificial intelligence technology. Coherent's CEO, Jim Anderson, stated that joining the S&P 500 is a testament to the company's team, technology, and customer trust.

title: Repligen Corporation $RGEN Shares Purchased by Geneva Capital Management LLC
summary: Geneva Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Repligen Corporation (RGEN) by 22.4% in Q3, now holding 596,768 shares valued at approximately $79.8 million. title: First Trust Advisors LP Raises Stock Holdings in SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. $SSNC
summary: First Trust Advisors LP significantly increased its stake in SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. by 114.2% in Q3, now owning 772,290 shares valued at approximately $68.55 million. title: Vestcor Inc Buys 14,346 Shares of Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. $RHP
summary: Vestcor Inc increased its stake in Ryman Hospitality Properties (NYSE:RHP) by 87.6% during the third quarter, purchasing 14,346 additional shares to bring its total holdings to 30,714 shares valued at approximately $2.75 million. title: 148,616 Shares in Enbridge Inc $ENB Bought by Kepler Cheuvreux Suisse SA

Analysts currently rate Enbridge with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $65.00.

title: Form 424B2 BARCLAYS BANK PLC
summary: Barclays Bank PLC has filed Form 424B2 for its $2,502,000 Callable Contingent Coupon Notes due March 9, 2029. These notes are linked to the performance of the S&P 500 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Index. The investment involves significant risks, including potential loss of principal, as returns are limited to contingent coupons and are subject to the performance of the least performing reference asset and the creditworthiness of Barclays Bank PLC.

title: Will Acurx Pharma's Ibezapolstat Redefine Treatment For C. Diff Infection?
summary: Acurx Pharmaceuticals (ACXP) is developing Ibezapolstat, a novel therapy for Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) that targets bacterial DNA replication. Phase 2 trials showed a 96% cure rate with no recurrences. The company is preparing for Phase 3 trials and plans a new pilot study for recurrent CDI patients, while also addressing the significant unmet medical need of preventing recurrence which accounts for a large portion of the $5 billion annual public health burden in the U.S.

title: WINTON GROUP Ltd Buys 58,039 Shares of The Chemours Company $CC
summary: WINTON GROUP Ltd has significantly increased its stake in The Chemours Company ($CC) by purchasing an additional 58,039 shares in Q3, bringing its total holdings to 114,100 shares valued at approximately $1.81 million. Other major institutional investors also boosted their positions, leading to institutional ownership of about 76.26%. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, Chemours recently surpassed EPS expectations and declared a quarterly dividend.

title: Wells Fargo initiates Anteris Technologies stock at Overweight
summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Anteris Technologies Global (NASDAQ:AVR) with an Overweight rating and a price target of $16.00, citing the promising DurAVR device and significant projected sales growth. The company also recently completed a public offering, raising $320 million, including a strategic investment from Medtronic plc to support clinical trials and commercialization. Analysts are optimistic about Anteris' prospects, noting strong buy ratings and high price targets.

title: Acacia Research: Fourth Quarter Earnings Overview
summary: Acacia Research Corp. reported a net profit of $3.4 million for the fourth quarter, a significant improvement from a loss in the previous year, with earnings of 4 cents per share. For the full year, the company achieved a net income of $21.7 million and total annual revenue of $285.2 million, demonstrating a successful turnaround to profitability. Shares were priced at $4.15 at market close.

title: Acacia Research (ACTG) Posts Quarterly and Annual Profit in 2025 - News and Statistics
summary: Acacia Research Corp. (ACTG) reported a net income for the fourth quarter of $3.4 million, or 4 cents per share, reversing a loss from the prior year. For the full fiscal year 2025, the company achieved a net income of $21.7 million, or 22 cents per share, on annual revenue of $285.2 million, marking a return to profitability. Quarterly revenue reached $50.1 million.

title: authID Partners with Section 2, Inc. to Secure “Intelligence as a Service” and Redefine Financial Crime Detection
summary: authID, a provider of biometric identity verification and AI governance, has partnered with Section 2, Inc., a financial threat intelligence pioneer. This collaboration integrates authID’s biometric platform and AI governance framework into Section 2’s TENet and TRACC solutions, aiming to secure "Intelligence as a Service" for financial organizations. The partnership enhances financial crime detection, particularly Anti-Money Laundering (AML), by ensuring that intelligence outputs are authorized, traceable, and secure through biometric auditability and AI governance.

title: Inside authID’s biometrics deal to secure AI-driven financial intelligence
summary: authID (Nasdaq: AUID) has partnered with Section 2, Inc. to integrate biometric identity verification and its Mandate AI governance framework into Section 2’s TENet and TRACC solutions. This collaboration aims to secure AI-driven financial intelligence by cryptographically binding intelligence outputs to verified identities, enhancing auditability, and protecting financial crime detection workflows like AML. The partnership targets the growing financial crime compliance market, projected to reach over $69 billion by 2034.

title: Magnetar Financial LLC Invests $32.36 Million in STAAR Surgical Company $STAA
summary: Magnetar Financial LLC has acquired a new stake of 1,204,371 shares, valued at approximately $32.36 million, in STAAR Surgical Company (NASDAQ:STAA). This investment represents about 2.42% of STAAR Surgical's total shares. Despite significant institutional ownership and recent insider buying, STAAR Surgical recently missed its Q3 earnings estimates, reporting an EPS of $(0.37) against an expected $0.14, and analysts currently have a "Reduce" rating with a target price of $18.94.

title: Baidu launches zero-deployment AI agent service DuClaw
summary: Baidu has launched DuClaw, a web-based AI agent service that allows instant access to the OpenClaw platform without requiring deployment or configuration. This new offering aims to address common challenges faced by users in deploying AI agents, providing a fully managed service on Baidu AI Cloud. The company also announced an introductory subscription rate for first-time users and highlighted recent financial news including an upcoming earnings report and a collaboration with Uber for autonomous ride-hailing services in Dubai.

title: Baidu’s DuClaw offers OpenClaw AI agents for about $2.50 a month
summary: Baidu has launched DuClaw, a zero-deployment service from its AI Cloud, offering instant web access to the open-source OpenClaw agent platform. This service, priced at an introductory rate of approximately $2.50 per month for first-time users, aims to lower technical barriers to AI agent adoption by providing pre-built Baidu skills and multi-model support on fully managed infrastructure. DuClaw is designed to integrate with enterprise collaboration platforms and expands on previous efforts to simplify OpenClaw deployment, reaching a potential audience of 700 million MAU through the Baidu App.

title: CACI to Participate in the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference 2026
summary: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) announced its participation in the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference 2026 in London. President and CEO John Mengucci and CFO Jeff MacLauchlan will lead a fireside chat on March 17 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. A live webcast and replay will be available on CACI's investor relations website.

title: Schroder Investment Management Group Has $48.12 Million Holdings in Masimo Corporation $MASI

title: Artiva: Sufficient Cash Runway to 2027 Supports Buy Rating Ahead of Key 2026 RA Efficacy Readouts

The company's cash position of $108M at the end of 2025 is expected to fund operations into Q2 2027, providing sufficient runway for these crucial data readouts. Another firm, H.C. Wainwright, also maintained a Buy rating with a $15.00 price target.

title: Artiva Biotherapeutics' (ARTV) Buy Rating Reiterated at Needham & Company LLC
summary: Needham & Company LLC has reiterated a "buy" rating for Artiva Biotherapeutics (ARTV) with an $18 target price, suggesting a 196% upside. The consensus among analysts is a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $19.00. title: Assessing Biohaven (BHVN) Valuation After Pipeline Optimism And Supportive Sector Sentiment
summary: Biohaven (BHVN) is gaining attention due to positive analyst commentary on its epilepsy drug opakalim and broader sector optimism. Despite recent share price gains, the company's high price-to-book ratio of 29.7x (compared to peer and industry averages) suggests it may be overvalued, especially given its pre-revenue status and net income loss. Investors are paying a premium for its pipeline, yet there are significant risks to consider.

title: Catheter Precision, Inc. Secures up to $88 Million in Strategic Institutional Financing Commitments to Fund Accelerated Growth

(NYSE American: VTAK) has secured up to $88 million in strategic institutional financing commitments to fund the accelerated growth of its newly acquired subsidiary, Flyte. This financing will support Flyte's expansion strategy, including fleet and market expansion for its regional air mobility platform, and will also fund Catheter Precision's medical device operations. The company aims to simplify its balance sheet and capitalize on the growing demand for time-efficient regional air travel.

title: BKV prices $261.7M underwritten offering of 9.69M shares with 30-day overallotment option
summary: BKV has priced an underwritten offering of 9.69 million common shares, expected to generate approximately $261.7 million in gross proceeds. The offering includes shares from BKV and a selling stockholder, with BKV planning to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes. The underwriters also have a 30-day option to purchase additional shares.

title: Private flights push: $88M fuels Flyte's bid for regional air mobility
summary: Catheter Precision (NYSE American: VTAK) has secured up to $88 million in strategic institutional financing commitments and completed the acquisition of Flyte, aiming to scale a national regional aviation platform. The funding is intended for fleet expansion, market growth, platform scaling, balance sheet simplification, and reduction of legacy liabilities. This move follows the company's recent pivot towards aviation while restructuring its medical-device balance sheet, positioning it for expansion in the regional air mobility market.

title: Adeia and UMC Expand Long-Term Collaboration in Hybrid Bonding Technologies

This collaboration extends into future generations of 3D integration and advanced packaging solutions. The agreement aims to address the growing demand for chiplet architectures across various applications, leveraging Adeia's foundational innovations to enhance advanced packaging services and device architectures.

title: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. Cuts Holdings in Pembina Pipeline Corp. $PBA
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. significantly reduced its stake in Pembina Pipeline Corp. by 33.5% in the third quarter, while other institutional investors like Vanguard Group and JARISLOWSKY FRASER Ltd. increased their holdings. title: ATRenew Posts Strong 2025 Revenue and Profit Gains on Pre-Owned Electronics Growth
summary: ATRenew Inc. reported significant revenue and profit growth for 2025, driven by increased online sales of pre-owned electronics and an expanded fulfillment network. The company's Q4 net revenues rose 29% year-on-year to RMB6.25 billion, and full-year revenues increased by 28.9% to RMB21.05 billion. This robust performance was attributed to economies of scale, technological efficiencies, and the expansion of its offline AHS stores, positioning ATRenew for continued growth in China's circular economy.

title: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. Raises Stock Position in Pan American Silver Corp. $PAAS
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. significantly increased its stake in Pan American Silver Corp. (NYSE:PAAS) by 385% in Q3, now holding 186,568 shares valued at $7.23 million, making it their 14th largest position. title: Brainsway earnings beat by $0.02, revenue topped estimates
summary: Brainsway (NASDAQ: BWAY) reported strong fourth-quarter results, beating analyst EPS estimates by $0.02 with $0.07 and topping revenue forecasts with $14.5 million. The company also provided optimistic FY 2026 revenue guidance of $66.00M-$68.00M, exceeding the consensus estimate. Brainsway's stock has shown significant growth, up 49.84% in the last three months and 146.80% in the last 12 months.

title: BrainsWay Posts Record 2025 Results and Issues Bullish 2026 Outlook on Deep TMS Momentum
summary: BrainsWay reported record Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, with significant revenue and income growth driven by increased demand for its Deep TMS systems and a shift towards multi-year lease agreements. The company plans for continued expansion into 2026, backed by regulatory approvals, clinical trials, and initial insurer coverage for its protocols. BrainsWay projects robust revenue growth and a near-doubling of Adjusted EBITDA for 2026.

title: Earnings Flash (BWAY) Brainsway Posts Q4 Revenue $14.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $14M
summary: BrainsWay Ltd. (BWAY) announced Q4 revenue of $14.5 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $14 million. The company released its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings results and will hold an earnings call on March 11, 2026. BrainsWay specializes in developing and marketing medical devices for neurological and psychopathological disorders, primarily utilizing its Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) system.

title: Fermi America™ Chief Nuclear Construction Officer Mesut Uzman Addresses NRC Regulatory Information Conference 2026, Showcasing Project Matador's Position as America's Most Advanced Nuclear Build
summary: Fermi America's Chief Nuclear Construction Officer, Mesut Uzman, addressed the NRC Regulatory Information Conference 2026, highlighting Project Matador as America's most advanced nuclear build. Uzman emphasized the project's readiness to break ground in 2026, its strategic partnerships with Westinghouse, Hyundai E&C, and Doosan, and its alignment with President Trump's executive orders to restore American nuclear leadership. Project Matador aims to deliver 4.4 GW of new nuclear power and an 11 GW behind-the-meter private power grid to meet surging electricity demand from AI and advanced manufacturing.

title: GameSquare Granted 180-Day Extension by Nasdaq to Regain Compliance with Minimum Bid Price Requirement
summary: GameSquare Holdings, Inc. announced that Nasdaq has granted it an additional 180-calendar day extension, until September 7, 2026, to regain compliance with the minimum closing bid price requirement of US$1.00 per share. The extension was approved because GameSquare meets other listing requirements and intends to cure the deficiency, potentially through a reverse stock split. The company is committed to monitoring its share price and taking necessary actions to ensure continued compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards.

title: Future FinTech Group Inc. (FTFT) Investigation: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages Stockholders to Contact the Firm to Learn More About the Investigation
summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Future FinTech Group Inc. (NASDAQ:FTFT) regarding potential corporate wrongdoing. The firm is encouraging stockholders who purchased Future FinTech securities before March 10, 2020, and still hold them, to contact them for more information about the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC operates on a contingency fee basis and aims to restore investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Technology Companies: ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN), Nvidia (NVDA) and Gitlab (GTLB)
summary: Analysts have provided conflicting sentiments on three technology companies: ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN), Nvidia (NVDA), and Gitlab (GTLB). Gitlab received a Hold rating from Morgan Stanley with a $29 price target.

title: CAE Inc $CAE is PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd.'s 4th Largest Position
summary: PCJ Investment Counsel Ltd. significantly increased its stake in CAE Inc (NYSE:CAE) by 1,427.2% in the third quarter, making CAE its 4th largest holding. summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in Matson, Inc. (NYSE:MATX) by 18.3% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 23,564 shares to own a total of 152,626 shares valued at approximately $15.05 million. title: Kontoor Brands, Inc. $KTB Shares Acquired by Victory Capital Management Inc.

title: Kepler Cheuvreux Suisse SA Takes Position in Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce $CM
summary: Kepler Cheuvreux Suisse SA has acquired a new position in Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (NYSE:CM) by purchasing 139,918 shares valued at approximately $11.18 million. title: Geneva Capital Management LLC Sells 9,931 Shares of Novanta Inc. $NOVT
summary: Geneva Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in Novanta Inc. by 1.0% during the third quarter, selling 9,931 shares but still holding 979,038 shares valued at approximately $98.05 million. This represents 1.7% of Geneva Capital Management's holdings and is its 17th biggest position. The report also highlights recent insider selling by CEO Matthijs Glastra and CFO Robert Buckley, and notes Novanta's latest quarterly earnings which beat EPS estimates while revenue slightly missed expectations.

title: SNOW Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Snowflake Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW) for alleged securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased shares between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024, to join before April 27, 2026. The lawsuit claims Snowflake made false and misleading statements regarding its revenue potential, specifically concerning its tiered storage pricing and customer efficiency gains. Investors who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm to discuss their rights.

title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: BETA Technologies, Inc. Class A (BETA) and Fuelcell Energy (FCEL)
summary: Analysts have provided new ratings for industrial goods companies BETA Technologies, Inc. Class A (BETA) and Fuelcell Energy (FCEL). Morgan Stanley reiterated a Buy rating on BETA with a $33.00 price target, and the stock generally holds a Strong Buy consensus. In contrast, Wells Fargo maintained a Sell rating on Fuelcell Energy with a $6.00 price target, reflecting a general Hold analyst consensus for FCEL.

title: Corporate lawyers turn to AI: use jumps from 20% to 87% in 3 years
summary: A new report by FTI Consulting and Relativity reveals that generative AI adoption in corporate legal departments has surged from 20% in 2023 to 87% in 2026. This significant increase highlights a major shift towards technology, with 53% of legal departments now having formal technology roadmaps and 70% planning new technology investments. The most common AI uses include summarization, clause identification, and transcription, indicating a growing reliance on AI for efficiency and strategic priorities within the legal sector.

title: AeroVironment, Kosmos Energy, Groupon And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
summary: Several prominent stocks, including AeroVironment, Kosmos Energy, and Groupon, experienced significant drops in pre-market trading on Wednesday. AeroVironment's shares fell due to lower-than-expected Q3 earnings and a reduced FY2026 sales guidance, while Kosmos Energy dipped after announcing a public offering of common stock. Groupon's decline followed its release of worse-than-expected quarterly financial results.

title: Snowflake Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Snowflake Class Action Lawsuit – RGRD Law
summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announced that investors who purchased Snowflake Inc. Class A common stock between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024, have until April 27, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Snowflake made misleading statements about the negative impact of product efficiency gains, Iceberg Tables, and tiered storage pricing on its future revenue projections. Following an announcement on February 28, 2024, regarding increased revenue headwinds, Snowflake's stock price fell by over 18%.

title: Afya (NASDAQ:AFYA) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Afya (NASDAQ:AFYA) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating. This upgrade comes amidst varying analyst opinions, with several firms adjusting their ratings and price targets for Afya, resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a consensus price target of $17.30. The article also details Afya's financial performance, market capitalization, and recent institutional investor activity.

title: Viking Holdings Ltd. $VIK Stock Holdings Decreased by Victory Capital Management Inc.
summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. reduced its holdings in Viking Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:VIK) by 60.3% in the third quarter, selling 359,495 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors like Invesco Ltd. and Federated Hermes Inc. significantly increased their stakes in Viking. The company has a "Moderate Buy" average rating from analysts with an average price target of $72.40.

title: Off-grid firefighter tracking: BK's LocateONE LITE uses existing radios
summary: BK Technologies (BKTI) has launched LocateONE LITE, a software-first solution for off-grid team tracking that utilizes existing BKR 9000 and BKR 5000 radios as gateways. This system allows real-time position sharing via the ATAK Android app for first responders, enhancing situational awareness without requiring additional hardware. The company will showcase LocateONE LITE at the 2026 IWCE in Las Vegas, emphasizing its commitment to interoperable, low-complexity public safety communications.

title: BK Technologies Announces Launch of LocateONE LITE
summary: BK Technologies Corporation has launched LocateONE LITE, an innovative software solution that provides seamless off-grid team location awareness for public safety without requiring additional hardware. This new offering leverages existing BKR 9000 and BKR 5000 radios as gateways for location reporting and integrates with the Android Team Awareness Kit (ATAK) app. LocateONE LITE aims to enhance situational awareness and safety for first responders in challenging environments.

title: Own Kaixin stock? What its 1-for-15 share consolidation means
summary: Kaixin Holdings (NASDAQ: KXIN) announced a 1-for-15 share consolidation effective March 13, 2026, which will increase the par value per share to $20.25 and adjust warrants proportionally. These findings, from a post hoc analysis of two 52-week placebo-controlled trials, support Lexicon's plan to resubmit the New Drug Application (NDA) for ZYNQUISTA (sotagliflozin) in 2026. The company noted that the drug's effects were less pronounced in patients with more severe chronic kidney disease (CKD Class 3A) but did not show an increased incidence of diabetic ketoacidosis based on kidney function.

title: International Business Machines (IBM) Develops a Novel Molecule, Here’s What You Need to Know
summary: International Business Machines (IBM), in collaboration with several universities, has announced the creation of a novel molecule, C₁₃Cl₂, featuring a half-Möbius electronic topology. This molecule's electrons travel in a unique corkscrew pattern, which can be reversibly switched. The development leveraged IBM's nanoscale legacy and quantum processors to simulate and reveal its exotic properties, marking a significant advancement in molecular science.

title: In tiny trial, malaria drug combo cleared a stubborn tick-borne infection
summary: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals announced that all three patients in its expanded-use clinical trial for relapsing babesiosis were cured after treatment with a tafenoquine-containing regimen. This data, combined with findings from a 2024 Yale report, suggests a near 100% cure rate for immunosuppressed babesiosis patients when weekly tafenoquine is added to existing treatments. The company believes these results warrant a review of current babesiosis treatment guidelines, despite tafenoquine not being FDA-approved for this specific condition.

summary: Campbell's Co. has lowered its annual sales and profit forecasts due to consumers opting for cheaper alternatives amid rising input costs. summary: Ford Motor Company has issued two separate recalls affecting over 83,000 vehicles. The first recall covers 47,804 model year 2025 Ranger, Lincoln Nautilus, Mustang, Maverick, Explorer, Escape, Lincoln Corsair, and Bronco vehicles due to potential loss of drive power from an exhaust gas recirculation valve issue. The second recall impacts 35,772 model year 2025-2026 Ford Explorer vehicles for headlight miscalibration causing glare. Owners will receive notifications and a free remedy, which for some Explorer models will be an over-the-air software update.

title: Oracle’s New Move to Handle Cash Crunch: Bring Your Own Chips
summary: Oracle is addressing the high costs of expanding its AI data center capacity by implementing a "bring your own chips" model, requiring customers to pay the upfront cost of expensive AI chips. This strategy aims to help Oracle manage its cash flow while continuing to build out the infrastructure needed for AI clients. The move comes as Oracle expands its cloud business to meet the growing demands of artificial intelligence.

title: Linde plc Plans New Air Separation Facility in Wisconsin
summary: Linde plc is constructing a new air separation plant in Oshkosh, Wisconsin, to enhance its industrial gas supply network in the United States. This facility, expected to be operational by 2028, will produce liquid oxygen, nitrogen, and argon using advanced cryogenic technology. The investment aims to meet the growing demand for industrial gases in Wisconsin and the Upper Peninsula of Michigan, supporting regional economic growth and improving supply chain efficiency.

title: Bunge Says Crop Rally From Iran War Is Spurring Farm Sales
summary: Bunge Global SA reports that the Middle East conflict, specifically attacks on Iran by the US and Israel, is boosting crop prices for US farmers. This is happening despite the conflict causing significant disruption to global trade flows, including surges in fertilizer and fuel prices due to blockades like the Strait of Hormuz. The situation is adding pressure on farmers who are already facing economic challenges and market access issues.

title: Here's How Much the Amex Platinum's Massive Welcome Bonus Offer Is Really Worth

title: Broadcom’s Next Catalyst Has Wall Street Asking an Awkward Question: Are We Late?
summary: Broadcom is experiencing rapid growth in its AI chip business, leading Wall Street analysts to question whether investors are accurately valuing its potential. While Nvidia dominates the AI hardware discussion, Broadcom is carving out a niche with custom AI accelerators for hyperscale data centers, attracting major tech companies like Google. Despite a significant rise in its stock over the past five years, cautious sentiment remains due to concerns about profit margins on custom chips and the speculative nature of long-term AI infrastructure spending.

title: Brazil's Raizen secures $12.6 billion out-of-court debt restructuring deal
summary: Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer Raizen has secured an out-of-court agreement to restructure approximately 65.1 billion reais ($12.61 billion) in debt. This marks Brazil's largest-ever out-of-court restructuring, with Shell proposing a 3.5 billion reais injection to support Raizen.

The study found PGI and AMRA tools reliable and sensitive, identified "End of Progression™" as the earliest meaningful endpoint, and informed the Phase 3 RAPIDe-3 trial's endpoint hierarchy. This real-world study reinforces the use of patient-centered measures in clinical trials for HAE, with a positive market reaction seeing PHVS stock gain 5.95% on the news.

This initiative builds on their successful past collaborations in quantum machine learning and seeks to strengthen the quantum technology sectors in both South Korea and Canada.

title: Arvinas to Present Phase 1 Data for ARV-102, a PROTAC LRRK2 Degrader, in Oral Session at the 2026 International Conference on Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s Diseases and Related Neurological Disorders
summary: Arvinas Inc. announced it will present Phase 1 clinical trial data for ARV-102, its PROTAC LRRK2 degrader for Parkinson’s disease, at the 2026 International Conference on Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s Diseases and Related Neurological Disorders. The presentation will detail new safety, pharmacokinetic, and pharmacodynamic information. ARV-102 is designed to cross the blood-brain barrier and target LRRK2, a protein implicated in Parkinson's and progressive supranuclear palsy.

title: Arvinas to present ARV-102 Parkinson’s trial data at conference
summary: Arvinas Inc. (NASDAQ:ARVN) will present Phase 1 clinical trial data for its Parkinson's investigational drug, ARV-102, at the 2026 International Conference on Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s Diseases in Copenhagen. The company plans to share safety, pharmacokinetic, and pharmacodynamic results for the orally bioavailable PROTAC degrader targeting LRRK2. Additionally, Arvinas intends to initiate a Phase 1b trial for ARV-102 in progressive supranuclear palsy (PSP) patients later in 2026.

title: Early ARV-102 Parkinson’s data to debut at Alzheimer’s-Parkinson’s conference
summary: Arvinas (Nasdaq: ARVN) announced it will present Phase 1 human data for its oral PROTAC degrader ARV-102, targeting LRRK2, at the AD/PD 2026 conference in Copenhagen. The presentation on March 18, 2026, will cover safety, pharmacokinetics, and pharmacodynamics in Parkinson's disease patients. This continues Arvinas' strategy of providing incremental clinical data updates for its PROTAC pipeline.

title: BBVA apuesta a triplicar su financiamiento verde en Argentina y fija una meta de US$ 3.000 millones para 2026
summary: BBVA Argentina announced a goal to mobilize over US$3 billion in sustainable financing by 2026, nearly doubling the US$2 billion channeled in 2025. This announcement was made during its first Sustainability Summit, emphasizing the transition towards a sustainable future as a strategic imperative for businesses. The event highlighted the banking sector's role in mobilizing capital, supporting clients, and scaling the transition to new productive models, with a focus on climate projects and inclusive growth initiatives.

title: James Cropper and Hexcel collaborate to advance aligned composite recycling
summary: James Cropper Advanced Materials and Hexcel are collaborating through the European Composites Circular Alliance (ECCA) to develop high-value composite materials from recycled carbon fiber. This partnership focuses on utilizing James Cropper’s Vectis aligned fibre technology to produce Unimat, aiming to achieve the necessary alignment and fibre volume fractions for demanding applications in aerospace, automotive, and mobility sectors. The initiative seeks to advance circularity and deliver meaningful structural performance using recycled materials, particularly for aerospace applications where weight reduction is crucial for fuel efficiency and emissions reduction.
source: JEC - Connecting the World with Composites
source_domain: JEC - Connecting the World with Composites

title: Serve Robotics and White Castle Launch Autonomous Delivery via Uber Eats

The collaboration highlights both companies' commitment to innovation and meeting growing consumer demand for reliable, convenient autonomous delivery.

title: Brenmiller accelerates BNRG360 amid EU energy turmoil
summary: Brenmiller Energy Ltd. is speeding up the deployment of its BNRG360 platform in Europe to address rising natural gas prices and energy security concerns. The BNRG360 strategy offers industrial customers bundled heat and power from renewable sources using Brenmiller's bGen thermal energy storage system, aiming to provide stable, cost-controlled energy and reduce reliance on volatile fossil fuel markets. CEO Avi Brenmiller highlights the system's ability to combine renewable resources with storage to create a cleaner, cheaper, and price-shock-hedged energy supply.

title: NICE says no to Genmab cervical cancer therapy
summary: NICE has issued initial guidance rejecting Genmab's cervical cancer therapy, Tivdak, for NHS use due to concerns about its cost-effectiveness. Tivdak was approved by the MHRA in December, showing improved overall survival compared to chemotherapy in patients with recurrent or metastatic cervical cancer. Genmab stated its commitment to working with NICE and the wider community to find a solution for NHS access, emphasizing the urgent need for new treatment options for this patient population.

title: Aptevo Reports Promising Interim Data for AML Therapy
summary: Aptevo Therapeutics announced promising interim data from two trials of its lead candidate, mipletamig, for newly diagnosed acute myeloid leukemia (AML) patients who are elderly or unfit for intensive chemotherapy. The combination regimen showed an 86% clinical benefit rate and 79% complete or near-complete remissions among 28 evaluable patients, with no cytokine release syndrome. These results support mipletamig's potential as a well-tolerated add-on to existing AML therapies, with a strong Buy rating from TipRanks analysts.

title: Capital One settles ERISA class action lawsuit for $9.6 million: You could receive money
summary: Capital One has agreed to a $9.6 million settlement in an ERISA class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleged that Capital One improperly managed its employee retirement plan by using unvested employer contributions to fund matching contributions instead of administrative expenses. Individuals who participated in the Capital One associate savings plan between November 11, 2018, and January 13, 2026, may be eligible for a cash payment, with no claim form required for current or former participants.

summary: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) has acquired Pinch Financial, a Toronto-based digital mortgage qualification technology provider. Pinch operates a platform that helps Canadians qualify for mortgages and submit applications to lenders by verifying borrower information online. This acquisition aims to accelerate RBC's digital roadmap and provide a more streamlined mortgage experience for its customers.

Paeper, a thermal management expert, to its board and Technology Committee, which is expected to enhance oversight in key growth areas like electrification and data centers. While this move strengthens the long-term technology roadmap, the company still faces near-term challenges with profitability and power semiconductor performance. Investors are advised to consider the potential for persistent margin pressure despite the positive long-term outlook from this strategic board appointment.

title: Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. Class Action Notice: Robbins LLP
summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Soleno Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SLNO), reminding investors of the lead plaintiff deadline. The lawsuit alleges that Soleno Therapeutics misled investors regarding the safety and efficacy of its Phase 3 clinical trial for DCCR, its commercial product for Prader-Willi syndrome. Multiple stock declines followed reports of safety concerns, a patient death, and lower patient adoption rates after a critical report.

summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has announced an investigation into Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) for potential violations of federal securities laws. This follows Nektar's disclosure on December 16, 2025, that its Phase 2b REZOLVE-AA trial for alopecia areata failed to meet statistical significance, leading to a significant drop in its stock price. Shareholders who experienced losses are urged to contact the law firm to learn about potentially pursuing a claim.

title: Longeveron Announces Closing of Private Placement of up to $30 Million

The financing, led by Coastlands Capital and including Janus Henderson Investors, supports the company's pivotal Phase 2b ELPIS II clinical trial for Hypoplastic Left Heart Syndrome (HLHS). An additional $15 million is contingent on achieving milestones related to the HLHS trial and share price, and the company also agreed to sell an interest in potential future proceeds from a Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher.

title: REMINDER: Ramaco Resources, Inc. Investors With Significant Losses Must Act By March 31, 2026

title: Inhaled IPF drug from United Therapeutics slows lung scarring in trial

title: Appeals Court Reverses DC Plan Class Certification
summary: The Fourth Circuit Court of Appeals has reversed a lower court's decision certifying a class action lawsuit against Genworth Financial Inc. regarding its 401(k) plan. The court ruled that claims under ERISA related to defined contribution plans involve individualized losses and therefore cannot proceed as a mandatory class action without opt-out rights. This ruling significantly impacts how fiduciary breach cases for defined contribution plans will be handled, emphasizing the individualized nature of investment performance and losses.

Husted, who is now a Senate candidate, previously worked closely with FirstEnergy on the bill after they funded his campaign.
